voice_profile: Royal Cyber Kingdom Voice (Friendly, Elegant, Encouraging)

scripts.guide_opening: Greetings! Welcome to our Royal Cyber Garden. I'm Dragon Kid. Let's explore the wonders of English in our Kingdom! Tap the magic gate to enter!
scripts.apple: Apple. A sweet gift from our royal orchard.
scripts.banana: Banana. A golden treasure from the sun.
scripts.lion: Lion. The brave guardian of our kingdom.
scripts.elephant: Elephant. The gentle giant of the cyber wild.
scripts.success: Splendid! A gift from nature! You've earned a royal star sugar!
